2335 Chemawa Rd NE, Keizer, OR 97303, USA

Tree seems unsprayed, as some fruits have bugs/worms. Still plenty fruit bug-free. Nice. Juicy, and mildly sweet apples. I picked half a paper bag full in late spetember. Some fruits are too tall, but some reachable. Access: Public.
